title: Property Settings
description: Manage your property's core details, policies, and financial settings.

policies.title: Policies & Localization
policies.description: Set rules, times, and regional settings.
policies.same_day_turnover_label: Allow same-day check-out and check-in for the same room
policies.cancellation_policy_placeholder: e.g., Free cancellation up to 48 hours before check-in...

legal_info.title: Legal Information
legal_info.description: This information will appear on official documents like invoices.
legal_info.tva_placeholder: e.g., TVA not applicable - Art 293 B of the CGI

finance.title: Finance & Loyalty
finance.description: Configure taxes and guest loyalty programs.
finance.points_value_description: Value of a single point when redeemed.
finance.loyalty_tiers_description: Define tiers based on the total points a guest has earned over their lifetime.

toasts.error_property_not_found: Property not found. Unable to save settings.
toasts.error_save: Failed to save property settings. Please try again.
